title: [ImportVerilog] Add support for associative array extractions
body:
Introduces `moore.assoc_array_extract` and `moore.assoc_array_extract_ref` to allow for associative array indexing.

Follows IEEE Std 1800™-2023 7.8 for accepted index types and extraction notation.

Added a separate handling block in `Expressions.cpp` for associative arrays since elements are extracted using an index rather than a low bit unlike previous 'UnpackedType`s.

If @Scheremo or @TaoBi22 could review when available
